# CO2-Enhanced iWUE: Code and Data Repository

This repository contains the code and data necessary to reproduce the key findings of our manuscript:

> **Zhan et al. (in press).** *Reduced water loss rather than increased photosynthesis controls CO₂-enhanced water-use efficiency.* Nature Ecology & Evolution.

## Code Overview

- **Main Figures**: Jupyter notebooks for reproducing key results (`Fig_1.ipynb`, `Fig_2.ipynb`, `Fig_3.ipynb`, `Fig_4.ipynb`, `Fig_5.ipynb`).
- **Method Examples**: 
  - `differencing_method_example.ipynb`: Demonstrates how we isolate the CO2 effect on iWUE at an example site using the differencing method described in the manuscript.
  - `perturbation_method_example.ipynb`: Demonstrates how we isolate the CO2 effect on iWUE at an example site using the perturbation method described in the manuscript.
